articles.title_en: Russian companies operate in almost all sectors of the economy of Uzbekistan
articles.lead_en: The share of business with Russian capital is about 17% among companies with foreign investment in the country, the trade mission of the Russian Federation in the republic clarified.

articles.title_en: Dmitriev: Russia told the truth about US biological laboratories in Ukraine
articles.lead_en: The Special Representative of the President of the Russian Federation for investment and economic cooperation with foreign countries called on Wikipedia to correct the article about these objects, entitled “conspiracy theory”
articles.title_raw: Дмитриев: Россия говорила правду о биолабораториях США на Украине

articles.title_en: At the end of 2025, trade turnover between Russia and Brazil exceeded $10 billion
articles.lead_en: The government of the republic noted that in relations between Moscow and Brasilia there has been progress “in many trade and economic areas”

articles.title_en: Dmitriev called on Hunter Biden to talk about his family's corruption in Ukraine
articles.lead_en: The Special Representative of the President of the Russian Federation for investment and economic cooperation with foreign countries said that the son of the former US President should also talk about biological laboratories and violations related to the Burisma company

articles.title_en: Senator Shenderyuk-Zhidkov: the return of Western business should be on Russian terms
articles.lead_en: It was mainly public companies that left the Russian market that did not want to lose investors due to the political situation under pressure from Ukraine and its Western partners, noted the Deputy Chairman of the Federation Council Committee on Budget and Financial Markets
articles.title_raw: Сенатор Шендерюк-Жидков: возвращение западного бизнеса должно быть на условиях РФ
